allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
[composer] improve test isolation, error handling, type safety, and guardian config

- Enable parallel test execution by making cost-tracker usage file
  configurable via MAESTRO_USAGE_FILE env var
- Add unified error hierarchy with 19 error classes (ComposerError base)
  covering validation, permission, network, filesystem, tool, session,
  and config errors with proper codes, categories, and retry hints
- Fix ~13 any types across TUI renderers, web handlers, and sandbox
  modules using proper type guards
- Add user-configurable Guardian settings via .composer/guardian.json
  with support for custom secret patterns, tool toggles, and excludes
- Add 110 new tests covering all improvements

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_DATE="2025-12-01T07:23:17" GIT_COMMITTER_DATE="2025-12-01T07:23:17" git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
[composer] integrate docker sandbox with tool execution

Wire up the existing sandbox infrastructure to the main CLI and tool
execution flow. Tools (bash, read, write, edit) already had sandbox
support - this change connects it to the user-facing interface.

Changes:
- Add sandbox factory (src/sandbox/index.ts) with docker/local modes
- Support --sandbox <mode> flag for both interactive and exec modes
- Support MAESTRO_SANDBOX_MODE environment variable
- Support .composer/sandbox.json configuration file
- Update CLI help with sandbox documentation
- Add comprehensive tests for sandbox integration
- Update SAFETY.md with sandbox usage guide

Docker mode starts an isolated container with workspace mounted,
falling back to local mode if Docker is unavailable.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_DATE="2025-12-01T07:47:22" GIT_COMMITTER_DATE="2025-12-01T07:47:22" git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
[composer] add oauth, tracing, rate limiting, thinking, and mcp docs

- Add OpenAI OAuth integration (src/oauth/openai.ts) with PKCE flow,
  local callback server, and credential storage integration
- Add agent-level OpenTelemetry tracing (src/agent/tracing.ts) for
  turns, tool calls, LLM requests, and approval flows
- Enhance rate limiter with tiered per-endpoint limits (TieredRateLimiter)
  for chat, model, files, command, and status endpoints
- Add /thinking slash command for adjusting reasoning levels
- Add comprehensive MCP server creation guide (docs/MCP_GUIDE.md)
- Fix sandbox integration test env var clearing

Addresses issues #230, #233, #234, #235, #240

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_DATE="2025-12-01T07:59:58" GIT_COMMITTER_DATE="2025-12-01T07:59:58" git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
[composer] add grouped slash commands for better discoverability

Organize related slash commands under parent commands with subcommands,
reducing command sprawl while maintaining backward compatibility:

- /sess: session management (new, clear, list, load, branch, export, share)
- /dx: diagnostics (status, about, context, bg, lsp, keys, pii, access, audit)
- /look: UI settings (theme, clean, footer, alerts, zen, compact)
- /safe: safety controls (approvals, plan, guardian)
- /vcs: git operations (status, diff, review)
- /auth: authentication (login, logout, status)
- /usage: usage tracking (cost, quota, stats)
- /back: undo system (undo, redo, checkpoint, history)

Original commands remain available as aliases for backward compatibility.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_DATE="2025-12-01T08:11:05" GIT_COMMITTER_DATE="2025-12-01T08:11:05" git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
[composer] fix bun:check script recursive workspace loop

Remove recursive workspace check from bun:check script that was
causing infinite loop when workspaces called back to root check.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
